title: Abstract Paint Explosion
summary: Fluid art chaos - splashes of magenta, cyan, gold paint mid-collision against white.
prompt: A frozen-moment high-speed photograph of paint mid-explosion: ribbons and droplets of magenta, cyan, gold, electric orange, and deep violet acrylic paint colliding in mid-air against a pure white seamless background. Crystal-clear motion, every droplet sharp, organic fluid shapes. Studio-strobe lighting, ultra-detailed liquid physics, fine-art-photography aesthetic. Square 1:1.
